prompt: A classic internet meme visual: the central question **"IS THIS REAL LIFE?"** in bold, all-caps white impact font, defined by a thick black outline and a subtle drop shadow. Place the text large and centrally, or near the top. The background should be a slightly blurred, relatable yet disorienting image depicting a chaotic scene (e.g., messy desk, confusing street corner) to emphasize disbelief, replicating a viral meme format.
prompt_refined: Generate an image in the style of a classic internet meme visual. The central element is the text **"IS THIS REAL LIFE?"** rendered in large, bold, all-caps white Impact font. This text must feature a thick black outline and a subtle drop shadow, positioned prominently and either centrally or slightly towards the upper half of the image. The background should be a slightly blurred, relatable yet disorienting chaotic scene, for example, a messy desk or a confusing street corner, to emphasize disbelief, replicating a viral meme format.
